<!-- Thanks for contributing! Keep this repo curated, not accumulated. -->

## What this PR does

<!-- One or two sentences. Answer-first. -->

## Type of change

- [ ] Add a resource (typed + annotated + within cap)
- [ ] Sharpen a stage / fix something wrong for 2026
- [ ] Add or improve a skills-check question
- [ ] Add or improve a portfolio brief
- [ ] Docs / typo / formatting

## Quality checklist

- [ ] Every new link is **typed** (📄/📘/🎬/🧑‍🏫/🛠️/💻/📰/🌐), **annotated** (one line on why), and within the **~8-per-section cap**.
- [ ] Repo links note **approx stars + license**.
- [ ] No promotional / affiliate / SEO-farm links.
- [ ] If a capped section gained a link, I **removed or replaced** a weaker one (named which).
- [ ] Voice stays answer-first, senior, concrete, dated-2026.
- [ ] License discipline respected (adapt MIT/Apache/CC0 with attribution; CC-BY-SA → link + commentary only).
- [ ] CTA domain is `https://landed.jobs` (no mixed domains).
- [ ] Links resolve (the lychee CI check passes).

## For a new skills-check question

- [ ] Multiple-choice with a **per-option "why"** for **every** option.
- [ ] Labelled by topic and tier (🟢 beginner / 🟡 intermediate / 🔴 advanced).
- [ ] Framed as a judgment call, not trivia.
